paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.32, representing a 3.95 percent decrease from the prior close and a 20.9 percent decrease over the last 21 sessions. There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus being built by Pantex, as well as an admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights. Additionally, retail traders have turned bullish on the company despite a sharp selloff.

There have been various SEC filings, including the appointment of four new officers, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing and 16 proxy solicitation filings.
